description: Every free Sensor Tower ranking, plus the rank history the dashboard forgets the moment you close the tab.

tools.name: apps_android
tools.description: Look up one or more Android apps by package name. Required: app-ids.

params.name: app-ids
params.description: Comma-separated Android package names (e.g. com.spotify.music)

tools.name: apps_get
tools.description: Full iOS app profile: exact category ranks, 400+ version history entries, in-app purchases, rating breakdown, related apps. Required: app-id. Optional: country (default: US).

params.name: app-id
params.description: iOS App Store ID (e.g. 460177396 for Twitch)

params.name: country
params.description: Two-letter country code for country-specific fields

tools.name: apps_ios
tools.description: Look up several iOS apps at once by numeric App Store ID (leaner than 'apps get'; accepts multiple IDs). Required: app-ids.

params.name: app-ids
params.description: Comma-separated iOS App Store IDs (e.g. 460177396 for Twitch)

tools.name: categories_list
tools.description: Every valid iOS category ID and Android category slug, as published by Sensor Tower.

tools.name: category_history
tools.description: Daily rank history for apps across chart types and countries over a date range. Required: app-ids, categories (default: 0), chart-type-ids (default: topfreeapplications), countries (default: US). Optional: start-date, end-date.

params.name: app-ids
params.description: iOS App Store ID to pull rank history for

params.name: categories
params.description: iOS category ID; 0 = Overall

params.name: chart-type-ids
params.description: Which store chart to read rank history from

params.name: countries
params.description: Two-letter country code

params.name: start-date
params.description: Range start as YYYY-MM-DD

params.name: end-date
params.description: Range end as YYYY-MM-DD

tools.name: category_summary
tools.description: Which categories and chart types an app currently ranks in. Required: app-ids.

params.name: app-ids
params.description: iOS App Store ID to summarize rankings for

tools.name: find_apps
tools.description: Search the store catalog by name; returns matching apps or publishers with download and revenue signals. Required: term. Optional: entity-type (default: app), os (default: ios).

params.name: term
params.description: Search text to match against app or publisher names

params.name: entity-type
params.description: Search for apps or for publishers

params.name: os
params.description: Which store catalog to search

tools.name: publishers_apps
tools.description: Every iOS app in a publisher's portfolio. Required: publisher-id, sort-by (default: downloads).

params.name: publisher-id
params.description: iOS publisher ID (e.g. 358612219 for Twitch Interactive)

params.name: sort-by
params.description: Sort field for the portfolio listing (required by the API)

tools.name: rankings_android
tools.description: Top Google Play charts for a category and country on a given date. Required: category (default: application), country (default: US), date. Optional: device (default: phone), limit (default: 25), offset (default: 0).

params.name: category
params.description: Google Play category slug; 'application' = Overall apps, 'game' = Overall games

params.name: country
params.description: Two-letter country code (e.g. US, GB, JP)

params.name: date
params.description: Chart date as YYYY-MM-DD (required by the API; a blank date returns HTTP 422)

params.name: device
params.description: Google Play device chart variant

params.name: limit
params.description: Rows to return per chart

params.name: offset
params.description: Row offset for paging deeper into the chart

tools.name: rankings_ios
tools.description: Top iOS charts (free/paid/grossing) for a category and country on a given date. Required: category (default: 0), country (default: US), date. Optional: device (default: iphone), limit (default: 25), offset (default: 0).

params.name: category
params.description: iOS category ID; 0 = Overall, 6014 = Games, 6016 = Entertainment

params.name: country
params.description: Two-letter country code (e.g. US, GB, JP)

params.name: date
params.description: Chart date as YYYY-MM-DD (required by the API; a blank date returns HTTP 422)

params.name: device
params.description: iOS device chart variant

params.name: limit
params.description: Rows to return per chart

params.name: offset
params.description: Row offset for paging deeper into the chart
